subject: Serawit Gezahegn Dejene
summary: 45-year-old Ethiopian asylum seeker died Jan 29, 2025 after 161 days at Eloy Detention Center. Abnormal pulse noted at intake but no follow-up for 4 months. Collapsed Dec 19 with 20% weight loss. Diagnosed with advanced HIV/AIDS, TB, and multiple opportunistic infections - all preventable with proper screening and care. ME cause: complications of multiple infections with HIV. Died 6 days after first 2025 death (Genry Ruiz Guillen).

key_findings.official_cause: Complications of multiple infections in the setting of HIV
key_findings.pattern: HIV/TB undiagnosed at intake, abnormal pulse ignored 4 months, 20% weight loss, preventable death
key_findings.public_health_risk: TB exposure in detention facility - highly contagious
